name: Plaid
philosophy: Developer-fintech brand balancing institutional credibility with a single moment of warmth — cobalt-on-white, geometric sans, Benjamin Franklin mascot, holographic gradient strip at hero only.

design_language.motion_signature: 180ms ease-out hover; signature 40s barely-perceptible horizontal shift of the holographic gradient strip beneath h1; Franklin mascot blink/wink on hover.

trademark_signals: Tail Holo gradient strip — rainbow-holographic, only at hero base, never repeated
Benjamin Franklin mascot — fintech with personality, the rare illustration that survived
Cobalt ink (#0a2540) as both type and primary button
Geometric sans with tight tracking — technical-precision cadence
Customer logos always in cobalt mono, never colored
ai_slop_avoided: Don't introduce saturated colors except in the Tail Holo
Don't add 3D rendered geometry or floating cards
Don't add a second mascot — Franklin stands alone
